mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT inner_q.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CASE WHEN inner_q.replyPin = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, inner_q.createdAtStr ASC ) AS rn FROM ( SELECT c.comment_id AS commentId, c.post_id AS postId, c.account_id AS accountId, c.content AS content, c.reply_pin AS replyPin, TO_CHAR(c.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAtStr, up.nickname AS writerDisplayName, up.handle AS writerHandle, up.hati_code AS writerHatiCode, (SELECT mf.url FROM SCOTT.media_files mf WHERE mf.ref_type = 'PROFILE' AND mf.ref_id = c.account_id AND ROWNUM = 1) AS writerAvatarUrl, c.reply_like AS writerLiked, c.reply_like AS likeCount FROM SCOTT.comments c LEFT JOIN SCOTT.user_profile up ON up.account_id = c.account_id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND c.deleted = 0 ) inner_q ) WHERE rn BETWEEN (#{offset} + 1) AND (#{offset} + #{limit})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SCOTT.comments WHERE post_id = #{postId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert:
SELECT SCOTT.SEQ_COMMENTS.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO SCOTT.comments ( comment_id, account_id, post_id, content, created_at, reply_pin, reply_like, deleted ) VALUES ( #{commentId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{accountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{postId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{content, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, 0, 0, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT p.account_id FROM SCOTT.comments c JOIN SCOTT.posts p ON p.post_id = c.post_id WHERE c.comment_id = #{commentId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.update: UPDATE SCOTT.comments SET reply_like = CASE WHEN reply_like = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END WHERE comment_id = #{commentId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE SCOTT.comments SET reply_pin = 0 WHERE post_id = (SELECT post_id FROM SCOTT.comments WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}) AND reply_pin = 1
UPDATE SCOTT.comments SET reply_pin = #{pin} WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
